description_long: This hammer features a robust, industrial design with a long, metallic shaft and a reinforced, polygonal head. The head is large and angular, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty impact, possibly for demolition or construction tasks. The shaft is segmented and appears to be made of a dark, durable metal, with a textured grip at the base for secure handling. There are visible blue and red accent components, possibly for added grip or as part of a mechanical enhancement. The midsection includes a brown, possibly leather or synthetic wrap, adding both visual contrast and ergonomic support. The overall appearance is modern and utilitarian, with a focus on strength and functionality.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a polygonal metal head, long textured shaft, and blue-red accent components, designed for robust urban tasks. Features a brown ergonomic wrap and a modern, industrial look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the polygonal head, blue and red accent components, and brown wrap around the midsection.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the head and the alignment of the shaft, with accent components visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the head's angular shape and mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the shaft's length, the grip at the base, and the alignment of the head and accent components.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, segmented steel handle with a textured, grippy base and a brown ergonomic wrap at the midsection.
attribute_head_type: Large, polygonal sledge-type head with flat striking faces and angular edges, designed for heavy impact.
